creator: 33n5ps+89brie9u1qz9g@sharklasers.com
text:
Biber [1] which is a BiBTeX replacement supporting UTF-8 is missing in the TeXLive installation.

Possible explanation why is it missing, might be in [2].




[1] http://www.ctan.org/pkg/biber
[2] https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2012-May/075180.html
